Animated MLOps system architecture

p01-energy-mlops · draw.io Animation.js · Docker · MLflow · Prometheus · Grafana
← Back to forecast

How it works

This page does not draw a simplified SVG. It embeds the original draw.io architecture diagram with icons and saved animation. The key parameter is p=anim in the viewer.diagrams.net URL, so the steps saved by the Animation.js plugin are replayed.

System URLs

FastAPIhttp://62.72.20.95:8101 MLflowhttp://62.72.20.95:5101 Prometheushttp://62.72.20.95:9101 Grafanahttp://62.72.20.95:3101
▶ Original animated draw.io diagram
If the animation does not start automatically, use the viewer.diagrams.net controls.

Technical note: the diagram is embedded as a viewer.diagrams.net URL with a #R... fragment encoded as standard Base64, not as a PNG image. This keeps the Docker/MLflow/Grafana icons and the animation saved in the draw.io file.
